title: Ne Zha
description: A fan-made mod of Ne Zha movie.
body:
# Ne Zha This is a fan-made mod based on the `Ne Zha` movie. **This mod is still WIP so please report any bug you met.** ## Contents ### Added - Characters: Ne Zha & Ao Bing.
- Food: Lotus Root series. Integrated with Farmer's Delight
- Armors and weapons such as Hot Wheel.
- Some skills. (Need to use command for apply currently.) ### Planned - All characters - Weapons - The full skill system. ## Any question or want to join us? Join our Discord: https://discord.gg/NDzz2upqAk
